name: Kai Yang (Garlic Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 4 Whole plants fresh coriander, including roots
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into halves.
2. Crush the garlic with salt to create a paste.
3. Wash and finely chop the fresh coriander, including roots, stems, and leaves.
4. Mix the garlic paste, salt, peppercorns, chopped coriander, and lemon juice in a bowl until well combined.
5. Rub the mixture evenly onto the chicken breasts.
6. Cover and let stand for at least one hour or overnight in the refrigerator to allow flavors to infuse.
7. Preheat the grill to high heat, about 6 inches from direct flames.
8. Place the chicken on the grill grate and cook, turning every 5 minutes, until the chicken is tender inside and the skin is crisp.
9. Serve hot. Serves 4.
NOTE: This dish is especially good when cooked over an open flame or barbecue.
